issues.description: GiveDon action is incorrect for this effect. The card text specifies 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active', which requires searching the DON!! deck and attaching a DON!! card. This should use AttachDon with a search condition, not GiveDon (which adds DON!! tokens to the leader).
Missing search/deck interaction. The action must search the DON!! deck and select a card to attach, not simply add a generic DON!! token.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Draw 1 card, then add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
